data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the ability to share a generated link across different channels, but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link for a one-off meeting, it lacks explicit mention of the ability to copy this link for sharing. This leads to a gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement, resulting in an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to copy the generated link for sharing via any channel.
